landing.course_intro:
Aimed at people with experience/knowledge in first aid, CPR and/or AED. It is intended mainly for healthcare professionals, security forces, professional rescuers, teachers, and people who already have knowledge in the field.
Designed so that future instructors can train students to effectively recognize and treat emergencies in adults, children and infants during the first critical minutes until emergency medical services personnel arrive.
